violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -French onion in the refrigerator had a metal spoon and handle in contact with food product. -Ice scoop handle was found in contact with ice at bar.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Serving bowls directly under a shelf with multiple seasonings and shakers are stored straight up and down. Advise turning upside down.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Hand washing station was used for straining lettuce
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Designated prep sink was not provided or not used for food items requiring washing/soaking. -Hand sink was used for straining lettuce.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Walk-in cooler has a hole forming (Soft floor) on first step from the door.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -The mop is stored in mop bucket unable to air dry.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Food bins in sliding door cooler were found without date marking.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Found numerous locations that had a build up of grease.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Handwash sink was missing towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Sidewalls and benches, tables legs and sides have a build up of grease/grim. Increase cleaning frequency.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
